channels.name: General Support
channels.detail: Use for account, access, or navigation help.

channels.name: Subscription Review
channels.detail: Use for payment proof, activation, or expiry questions.

channels.name: Bug Report
channels.detail: Use when a page, route, or interaction is not working as expected.

channels.name: Feature Guidance
channels.detail: Use for help understanding platform structure and intended workflows.

policy: Support does not provide trading advice.
Support does not interpret market direction for users.
Support addresses platform usage, access, and technical issues.
